name: Taxamo
description: Taxamo — EU VAT and global digital services tax compliance API for calculating, collecting, and reporting indirect taxes on digital goods.

when_to_use: EU VAT calculation for digital services sold to EU consumers
Automating MOSS/OSS VAT reporting for digital goods sellers
Tax-compliant invoicing for global digital subscription billing

pros: Robust EU VAT MOSS and digital services logic
APIs for calculation, collection and reporting
review.verdict: Battle-tested VAT API for digital services — watch how Vertex integrates it before long commitments.
review.best_for: Digital services companies needing reliable EU VAT handling via an API.
review.not_for: Companies wanting broad physical-goods tax coverage or indie-friendly pricing.
